THEPENITENT-BURDEN_POWER.description: At the end of combat, lose HP equal to your Burden. If this would kill you, survive at 1 HP and lose Max HP equal to the excess.
THEPENITENT-BURDEN_POWER.smartDescriptio: At the end of combat, lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP. If this would kill you, survive at 1 HP and lose Max HP equal to the excess.
THEPENITENT-BURDEN_POWER.title: Burden
THEPENITENT-FAITH_POWER.description: Faith prevents damage equal to its amount. This persists between turns. At the start of your turn, lose half of your Faith.
THEPENITENT-FAITH_POWER.title: Faith
THEPENITENT-GRIM_CERTAINTY_POWER.descrip: Whenever your Descend creates Burden, deal damage to a random enemy.
THEPENITENT-GRIM_CERTAINTY_POWER.smartDe: Whenever your Descend creates Burden, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to a random enemy.
THEPENITENT-GRIM_CERTAINTY_POWER.title: Grim Certainty
THEPENITENT-ZEALOUS_RETORT_POWER.descrip: Whenever Faith prevents damage, deal damage to the attacker
THEPENITENT-ZEALOUS_RETORT_POWER.smartDe: Whenever Faith prevents damage, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to the attacker
THEPENITENT-ZEALOUS_RETORT_POWER.title: Zealous Retort
